title: Meta-learning for wrestling

title: Better exploration with parameter noise

title: Proximal Policy Optimization

title: Hindsight Experience Replay

title: Faster physics in Python
summary: Open-sources mujoco-py, a high-performance Python library for robotic simulation with the MuJoCo engine, built during a year of robotics research to speed up large-scale simulated experiments.

title: OpenAI Baselines: DQN

title: Robots that learn
summary: Demonstrates one-shot imitation on physical hardware: a robotics system trained entirely in simulation is deployed on a real robot and learns to perform a new task after seeing it demonstrated just once.

title: Roboschool

title: Unsupervised sentiment neuron

title: Spam detection in the physical world

title: One-shot imitation learning

title: Learning to communicate
summary: Outlines research in which RL agents in a simple 2D world invent their own grounded language: discrete symbols whose meanings emerge from cooperative goal-driven tasks rather than from training on human text.
